title: Binary Conversion
description:
⏱ Time: 6 mins
Part A: Convert decimal to 8-bit binary.
Part B: Count number of 1s.
part_a_prompt: # PART A: Write a function 'decimal_to_8bit_binary' that takes a decimal integer and returns its 8-bit binary representation as a string with zero padding.
part_b_prompt: # PART B: Use your partner's 'decimal_to_8bit_binary' to implement 'count_ones(n)'. It should return the integer count of '1's in the binary representation of n.
